microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **data validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a lakehouse-style automation system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform with self-service scheduling and pipeline orchestration, cutting operational toil by 30% and migrating execution to a scalable, production-grade model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation program, delivering end-to-end performance testing in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects across large-scale distributed workloads.

Directed **14 cross-org production executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring rigorous data governance.

Architected integration workflows with Databricks and SAP as strategic enterprise partners, aligning cloud transformation roadmaps and proving platform value through hands-on **production workload optimization**.

Automated drill planning via an internal AI agent and restructured SQL-based reporting pipelines, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing annual drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Delivered executive-facing architecture reviews and technical training sessions to drive **cloud transformation adoption**, mirroring the SSA model of guiding customers from evaluation through production deployment.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-powered workflow adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading hands-on demos and training sessions for code generation tooling, saving 37 engineering hours monthly on data pipeline and YAML authoring tasks.

Shaped the **product roadmap** toward intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps in data modeling and configuration workflows.

Improved **semantic search and data retrieval** by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered search platform, cutting average lookup time by 83% across large-scale internal knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, enabling 140+ teams to launch cloud regions 28% faster with reduced migration toil.

Built a product roadmap to eliminate 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to map **critical-path automation** gaps across data pipelines and deployment workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and workload sizing across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify high-impact automation targets and prioritize cloud migration investments effectively.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero downtime** across a 2,000+ unit production pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping data dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and validating end-to-end workload performance post-cutover.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and accelerating delivery of warehouse automation software to production.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting software deployment cycle time by 25% and establishing a repeatable model for large-scale production rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% through a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to target high-value customer segments.

Improved leadership **pricing and margin models** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying cost leakage patterns and delivering data-driven recommendations to close margin gaps.
